name: dogtail
summary: GUI test tool and automation framework that uses Accessibility (AT-SPI) technologies to communicate with desktop applications.
author_email: Zack Cerza <zcerza@redhat.com>, Ed Rousseau <rousseau@redhat.com>, David Malcolm <dmalcolm@redhat.com>, Vitezslav Humpa <vhumpa@redhat.com>, Michal Odehnal <modehnal@redhat.com>
